news-korea-econ.title: Trump seeks warships from other countries to help secure Strait of Hormuz
news-korea-econ.description: Trump calls for international warships to secure Strait of Hormuz as Iran allegedly threatens global oil shipping routes from the Middle East region.

news-global-econ.title: Saudis give oil buyers Red Sea option as Hormuz crisis persists
news-global-econ.description: Buyers who choose to receive their allocation via the Red Sea port of Yanbu will only get a portion of their monthly supply due to constraints on how much crude the pipeline to the port can carry

news-global-econ.title: Bitcoin in Iran limbo as ‘old economy’ assets steal limelight
news-global-econ.description: The original cryptocurrency is beating stocks and gold since the Iran war broke out, but that says more about how far it had already fallen than where it’s headed. The token is down more than 40% from an October peak

news-global-econ.title: Former Obama Campaign Managers Warn Democratic Party Is a Mess
news-global-econ.description:
Two former campaign managers for former President Barack Obama warned that the Democratic Party is a mess ahead of the 2028 presidential election, due to not knowing what they stand for.

news-global-econ.title: US could take Iran’s main oil export hub ‘at a time of our choosing,’ Jack Keane says
news-global-econ.description: Retired Gen. Jack Keane warns U.S. could seize Iran's critical Kharg Island oil hub "at a time of our choosing," potentially crippling Tehran's economy.

news-global-econ.title: 'CODE RED' Author Tells 'Daily Mail:' AI 'Data Vacuums' Like TikTok and DeepSeek Are Chinese Espionage Tools
news-global-econ.description: CODE RED author Wynton Hall tells the Daily Mail in an interview published Sunday that China has disguised its "data vacuum" AI espionage tools as popular apps like TikTok and DeepSeek. According to Hall, users of these "Trojan Horse" apps are "effectively su…

news-global-soc.title: CNN liberal panelist argues billions spent on defense should go to health insurance instead
news-global-soc.description: CNN panelists debate U.S. priorities as Leigh McGowan questions whether spending on the Iran conflict should instead go toward addressing healthcare challenges at home.

news-global-soc.title: Veteran '60 Minutes' reporter says the network 'crumbled' under Trump's pressure
news-global-soc.description: Veteran "60 Minutes" correspondent Scott Pelley slammed CBS for settling President Donald Trump's election interference lawsuit, saying previous owners "faced political pressure and crumbled."

news-global-soc.title: Oscars 2026: Academy Awards 'Most Protected Event in Oscars History'
news-global-soc.description:
The 98th Academy Awards on Sunday night will be the "most protected event in Oscars history," with more than 1,000 law enforcement personal protecting the celebrity elites gathered to celebrate themselves.
